title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-30
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished watering the plants and updating the daily app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the app directory and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel art robot watering plants in a greenhouse, with the bee mascot holding a tiny clipboard checking off a list. Represents automated health checks and metrics updates.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard, checking off a list. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
